title: I Built an AI That Builds You a Course on Anything (In Seconds)
summary: Tristen O'Brien built an AI tool that generates personalized online courses based on user-specified topics and skill levels in under two minutes. The tool structures learning pathways using Claude, organizes content into syllabi, and includes an AI chatbot tutor for course interaction.
